stemHtml: The operating principle of an inertial system consists in…

options.a: measuring the position of the aircraft and performing integrations to elaborate the ground speed and acceleration.
options.b: measuring the earth rotation and performing integrations to elaborate the aircraft ground speed and position.
options.c: measuring the acceleration of the aircraft and performing integrations to elaborate the ground speed and the position.
options.d: measuring the acceleration, speed and position of the aircraft.
